action.reasoning: Observation: Empty workspace and no baseline yet. Analysis: Need a fast end-to-end continual learning pipeline with immediate eval to validate predict.py and measure iteration time. Decision: Implement a strong simple baseline using pretrained ResNet18 adapted to 32x32 with rehearsal memory + balanced finetuning across 10 tasks, train only a few epochs per task, test predict locally, then submit eval.
action.command: python train.py --epochs 3 --ft_epochs 1 --batch_size 128 --lr 0.01 --ft_lr 0.005 --memory_per_class 20 --out checkpoints/baseline.pt && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline.pt --output pred_local.json
